title: Linux PCIe host bridge/root complex driver completeness checklist
description: PCIe root complex checklist for host bridge drivers.

items: host bridge resources/ranges are mapped to outbound windows
link-up polling and failure handling are bounded
MSI/legacy interrupt domains are wired correctly
config space access is gated by link/window readiness

source_review_steps: Inspect pci_host_bridge setup, ranges parsing, link polling, config access, MSI domain setup, and error paths.
